title: Lapeirousia grandiflora
taxonomy: Lapeirousia grandiflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It belongs to the genus Lapeirousia, which is a group of plants endemic to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Within the family Iridaceae, Lapeirousia grandiflora is further classified as a member of the subfamily Iridoideae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaves and flowers, which are typical of the Iridaceae family. The exact classification of Lapeirousia grandiflora is still a subject of ongoing research and study in botany.
